name: College Football Data MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for the College Football Data API (CFBD) — a comprehensive database of historical and current NCAA college football statistics, game data, recruiting, and rankings. Enables AI agents to query team stats, game scores, player data, betting lines, and historical records for college football analytics.
use_cases: Querying college football game scores and team statistics for sports analytics agents
Analyzing player and recruiting data from college football databases
Building sports prediction models using CFBD historical data via AI agents
Creating college football dashboards and reports using CFBD API data
not_for: NFL or professional football (CFBD is NCAA college football only)
Real-time live game data (CFBD has delays for live data)
best_when: A sports analytics developer or enthusiast building college football analysis tools wants AI agents to query comprehensive NCAA football statistics, team data, and historical records.
avoid_when: You need pro football (NFL) data, live real-time scores, or sports beyond college football.

auth.notes: CFBD API key required. Free API key available at collegefootballdata.com after registration.

pricing.free_tier_limits: CFBD free tier: access to most endpoints with API key
pricing.paid_tiers: Patreon supporters get enhanced access and higher rate limits
pricing.notes: CFBD API is largely free with registration. Community-supported project. MCP server is free open source.

performance.rate_limits: CFBD rate limits vary by endpoint; generally sufficient for development use

known_agent_gotchas: CFBD data covers FBS and FCS — filter by division for consistent results
Historical data is comprehensive but current season data may have delays
Rate limits not clearly documented — implement backoff for bulk queries
Community-maintained project — occasional downtime or data gaps
agent_readiness.security_notes: Public sports data — low sensitivity. API key required but data is non-sensitive. HTTPS.

security_score_components.security_notes: Public sports data — minimal security concerns. API key for rate limiting. HTTPS.
